title: Two parallel phosphorus economies
abstract: Published online: 14 July 2026; doi:10.1038/s41563-026-02687-3 Paul Westerhoff and Jacob Jones discuss how the unique chemistry of phosphorus enables technologies beyond agricultural fertilizers, ranging from batteries to semiconductors and quantum materials.
